stemHtml: When an aircraft is subject to unlawful interference, who is responsible for collecting and then transmitting pertinent information on the flight to other States responsible for Air Traffic Service units likely to be concerned with the flight, including the unit at the airport of presumed intended destination? The…

options.a: Security Agency of the Contracting State that has issued the AOC and has oversight of the operator.
options.c: operator holding the AOC upon which the aircraft is listed.
options.d: Contracting State presently responsible for providing air traffic services to the aircraft.
